title: Botox vs Dermal fillers | Dr Tim's Tips
filename: Botox vs Dermal fillers ｜ Dr Tim_s Tips.en.vtt
excerpt: Botox versus dermal fillers which is better Botox effectively relaxes muscle and in some cases increases the resting tone of untreated muscle so we use it in entirely different places on the face to achieve different results the dermal fillers work simply by adding volume to the …

segments.text: Botox versus dermal fillers which is better Botox effectively relaxes muscle and in some cases increases the resting tone of untreated muscle so we use it in entirely different places on the face to achieve different results the dermal fillers work simply by adding volume to the skin they can decrease creases they can change the shape of the face in a way that Botox R can't certainly not by the same mechanism so it really matters what exactly the aesthetic problem is you're trying to solve and I say in most cases one there isn't a 50/50 L both are kind of similar there's usually an absolutely clear and concise answer which is that dermal fillers are going to be better or Botox will be better it's very rarely either/or and a good clinician will give good advice to their patients so that they both feel certain going into the procedure that it's the right thing for them you can think of dermal fillers a little bit like a cars and boats they're both modes of transport but entirely different in how they work and they're not useful in the same places

transcript: Botox versus dermal fillers which is better Botox effectively relaxes muscle and in some cases increases the resting tone of untreated muscle so we use it in entirely different places on the face to achieve different results the dermal fillers work simply by adding volume to the skin they can decrease creases they can change the shape of the face in a way that Botox R can't certainly not by the same mechanism so it really matters what exactly the aesthetic problem is you're trying to solve and I say in most cases one there isn't a 50/50 L both are kind of similar there's usually an absolutely clear and concise answer which is that dermal fillers are going to be better or Botox will be better it's very rarely either/or and a good clinician will give good advice to their patients so that they both feel certain going into the procedure that it's the right thing for them you can think of dermal fillers a little bit like a cars and boats they're both modes of transport but entirely different in how they work and they're not useful in the same places same places [Music]
